Product.title: Product
Product.description: Represents an individual item available for sale in the Super 9+ POS system, including inventory details and pricing.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Product entity.

name.description: The name of the product (e.g., Amul Milk).

description.description: A brief description of the product.

barcode.description: The barcode associated with the product, used for scanning.

imageUrl.description: URL to the product's image, used for quick-tap icons.

sellingPrice.description: The price at which the product is sold to customers.

costPrice.description: The cost price of the product, used for profit calculation.

stockQuantity.description: The current quantity of the product in stock. If not provided, inventory for this item is considered untracked.

categoryId.description: Reference to the Category this product belongs to. (Relationship: Category 1:N Product)

isTopSeller.description: Indicates if the product is among the top 20 most-sold items, for quick-tap access.

isActive.description: Indicates whether the product is currently active and available for sale.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the product was first created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the product's information.

Category.title: Category
Category.description: Organizes products into logical groups for better management and search functionality.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Category entity.

name.description: The name of the category (e.g., Dairy, Beverages).

description.description: A brief description of the category.

Customer.title: Customer
Customer.description: Stores information about a customer, used for loyalty programs, personalized offers, and purchase history tracking.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Customer entity.

phoneNumber.description: The customer's phone number, used for identification and communication. This should be unique.

name.description: The full name of the customer.

email.description: The customer's email address for communication.

points.description: Loyalty points accumulated by the customer.

totalSpent.description: The total monetary amount the customer has spent.

lastVisitDate.description: The timestamp of the customer's last purchase or interaction. Used for 'We miss you' coupon logic.

isFlaggedForCoupon.description: Flag indicating if the customer is eligible for a 'We miss you' WhatsApp coupon.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the customer profile was first created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the customer's information.

Purchase.title: Purchase
Purchase.description: Records a single customer transaction or sale, including all items purchased, payment details, and applied discounts.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Purchase entity.

customerId.description: Reference to the Customer who made the purchase.

staffId.description: Reference to the Staff member who processed the sale.

timestamp.description: The exact date and time when the purchase was made.

totalAmount.description: The final total amount of the purchase after all discounts.

subtotalAmount.description: The total amount of the purchase before any discounts were applied.

discountAmount.description: The total monetary amount discounted from the purchase.

items.description: An array of objects, each representing a product bought in this purchase.

isOfflineSale.description: Indicates if this sale was initially recorded offline.

CashTransaction.title: CashTransaction
CashTransaction.description: Records manual cash flow in or out of the register without a sale (e.g., adding change, vendor payments).
